daily_summary.headline: Starship Test Flight and Aurora Opportunities Highlight the Day

top_events.title: Starship Flight 12
top_events.description: 12th test flight of the two-stage Starship launch vehicle. Maiden Flight of Starship V3.
top_events.action: Watch live for potential groundbreaking advancements in reusable space technology.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 level geomagnetic storm expected, providing a good chance for aurora sightings at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check skies if you're above 60° latitude for potential aurora displays.

top_events.title: Vega-C Launch with SMILE Mission
top_events.description: Joint mission between ESA and the Chinese Academy of Sciences to study Earth's magnetosphere.
top_events.action: Follow the launch for insights into Earth's space environment interactions.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
